title: Creating boards for clients

posts.author: sgriggs (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml: We have a client that we are creating a board for. We consider the client’s workspace to be production and our workspace for the client to be development. I’m hoping someone can provide some guidance as to how we can push any changes we make to our board (development) to our clients (production) without destroying the data they have input into their board. Is this even possible?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sgriggs! In case you haven’t already figured out a solution for this, have you tried using mirror columns to show information from your development board in their production board?

Here’s more information on that feature: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001733859-The-Mirror-Column

Let us know at support@monday.com if you need further assistance or have any questions!
